vulnerabilities.fix: Add Helmet middleware for setting secure HTTP headers and configure CORS with a whitelist in the server configuration.

vulnerabilities.description: Lack of rate limiting in the Express application.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement rate limiting using an appropriate middleware like express-rate-limit.

vulnerabilities.description: No indication of RBAC or ABAC for permission checks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Introduce a middleware that checks user roles/permissions and apply it to the necessary endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: Environment secrets such as JWT_SECRET might be logged if logging is not properly set up.
vulnerabilities.fix: Review logging configuration to ensure that sensitive data is excluded. Use structured logging libraries like Winston, ensuring sensitive data is not included in logs.
